channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Smashing Pumpkins, Chris Stapleton to Perform America’s Block Party Benefit Concert
item.description: 🎶 Pumped for this epic lineup at America’s Block Party! Smashing Pumpkins and Chris Stapleton bringing the 🔥 #MusicForACause 🎉

item.title: Future Reveals New Album The Real Me
item.description: 🚀 Dive into @1future's latest vibe with 'The Real Me' album! 🎶💥 Let's discover the real Future together! 🔥 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Boy George Launches AI Company To Help Artists Reclaim Their Hits
item.description: 🎤 Boy George takes the music world by storm with his new AI venture! 🚀 Who's ready for some revolutionary tunes? #AIRevolution #BoyGeorgeMusic

item.title: Amanda Seyfried Reveals Viral Dulcimer Performance Stemmed From A Shelved Joni Mitchell Movie
item.description: Amanda Seyfried's dulcimer skills shine bright! 🌟 Who knew it all started with a shelved Joni Mitchell project? 🎶 #MusicNews

item.title: Madonna shares video for Sabrina Carpenter collab “Bring Your Love” ft Julia Garner
item.description: 🎵 Get ready to dance with Madonna's new collab "Bring Your Love" ft. Sabrina Carpenter & Julia Garner! 💃✨ #Madonna #NewMusic #Collaboration
